title: Bundle of Bartoline Wallpaper Stripper 500 ml – Fast-Acting Concentrated Solution for Easy Wallpaper Removal + Tetrion Filler Knife
features: FAST & EFFICIENT WALLPAPER REMOVAL: Breaks down adhesive for quick and easy stripping of all standard wallpaper types, including vinyl and textured papers.
COST-EFFECTIVE CONCENTRATED FORMULA: Mixes 125ml with 4.5L of warm water for wide coverage, ideal for large wallpapered areas.
SIMPLE APPLICATION FOR ALL SKILL LEVELS: Easy to mix and apply with a cloth, sponge, or brush—perfect for both home decorators and professionals.
INCLUDES HIGH-QUALITY FILLING KNIFE: Tetrion Filling Knife with a hardened and tempered steel blade helps repair uneven or cracked areas post-wallpaper removal.
COMFORT & CONTROL GUARANTEED: Ergonomic soft-grip handle and non-slip base ensure better grip and user comfort during use, even on big projects.
description: Bartoline Wallpaper Stripper Solution & Tetrion Filling Knife – The Ultimate Wall Prep Duo. Make wall preparation effortless with this powerful combination of Bartoline Wallpaper Stripper Solution and the Tetrion Filling Knife. Perfect for decorators, DIYers, and renovation professionals, this duo ensures smooth and ready-to-redecorate walls every time.
